artifact_text: ProofMesh checks whether claims have source coverage, lexical support, and contradiction markers. ProofMesh guarantees factual truth for every possible claim.

claims.text: ProofMesh checks whether claims have source coverage, lexical support, and contradiction markers.
ProofMesh guarantees factual truth for every possible claim.

sources.title: ProofMesh MVP Limitations
sources.text: The first version checks whether claims have source coverage, lexical support, and obvious local contradiction markers.

sources.title: Unrelated Source
sources.text: ProofMesh is a CAP-callable verification agent for generated outputs in agent workflows.
